channel.title: Photos from everywhere
channel.description: This bustling city of over 18 million people was exciting. The views from our hotel window as well as the cocktail lounge and the restaurants where we ate dinner, were spectacular. We loved our modern Royal Meridien French hotel. The Yuyaun Garden is one of the city’s finest. We also visited the French Concession and the site of the Jewish synagogue.
